testsuite.name: package1.AmazonApplication.TC12_ValidateSelectingPaymentOptions

testcase.name: selectingPaymentOptions
testcase.system-out: Browser Launched Successfully Hoverover on Accounts and list is successful Click on signin is successful Username entered successfully Click on continue button is successful Password entered successfully Click on submit is successful Product search is successful Click on add to cart is successful Click on go to cart is successful Click on Proceed to buy is successful
